How to Write
an IG Bio That
Gets You Paid

New Horizon Creators · 01

If your IG bio isn't doing the selling for you.. you're leaving money on the table.

Every profile visit is a pitch. Every line in your bio is real estate. If your name field, hook, or proof is off... brands bounce.

This 5-line framework has helped creators land 4-figure brand deals, attract coaching clients in the DMs, and triple their profile conversions.

You're about to use it to turn views into value. And yes.. it works even if you've got 400 followers. Let's gooo 🔥

New Horizon Creators · 02

New Horizon Creators · 03
Your Instagram bio has 5 key lines. Most creators write them randomly. We write them strategically so every visitor instantly knows who you help, what you do, and why they should care.
NAME
WHO YOU HELP
KEYWORDS
SOCIAL PROOF
CTA
New Horizon Creators · 04
Line 1

Your Name Field (SEO for Discovery)

Formula:

[Your Name] | [Keyword/Topic]

Examples:

  • Alexa | Travel Tips
  • Jamie | Brand Partnerships Coach
  • Skye | Skincare Creator
Line 2

Who You Help (Your Hook)

Formulas to Try:

  • Helping [avatar] [get result] in [time]
  • Helping [avatar] [achieve result] without [pain point]

Examples:

  • Helping creators land 4-figure brand deals without big followers.
  • Helping skincare brands get more clicks from UGC.
  • Helping 9-5ers build income with Instagram.
New Horizon Creators · 05
Line 3

Keywords (Your Content Buckets)

Examples:

  • Brand Deals 💼 | Skincare Reviews 📅 | Camera Tips 📷
  • Creator Tips 📈 | Monetization 💰 | Daily Vlogs 🌐
Line 4

Social Proof (Build Instant Trust)

Examples:

  • 🌟 1M+ views generated for brands
  • 📈 Featured by GoPro & Apple
  • 💰 $10K+ earned from content last quarter

If you're newer: Use small wins:

  • 100K+ video views
  • Built 5-figure side hustle
New Horizon Creators · 06
Line 5

Call to Action (What's Next?)

Examples:

  • 🔁 DM me “BRANDS” for my pitch template
  • 📅 Book a free collab call 👇
  • 🧳 View my brand portfolio here 🔗

Before / After Example

Before (Bad):
tylersidequests ▾☰
61posts
488followers
705following
Tyler Montgomery he/him
Keep Moving 🌊
Leave Room for Exploration 🌍
Currently in USA 🇺🇸
After (Good):
tylersidequests ▾☰
61posts
488followers
705following
Tyler | Travel & Adventure | UGC he/him
helping travelers explore + brands grow through story
Adventure Tips | Travel UGC
📍 28/195 Mexico
Collabs → DM / tylersidequests@gmail.com
Daily paid DM inquiries began after this change.
